title: Update UI theme to authentic Free Fire battle aesthetics and display owner name NIRANJAN

requirements.summary: Replace current background styling across all pages with authentic Free Fire battle-themed backgrounds featuring battlefield environments and combat zones
acceptanceCriteria: All pages display Free Fire battle-themed backgrounds instead of generic dark gaming backgrounds
Background imagery reflects actual Free Fire battle environments and combat aesthetics
Backgrounds maintain visual consistency across the application

file_operations.description: Replace the current gaming texture background with Free Fire battle-themed backgrounds. Update the body background styling to use the generated images frontend/public/assets/generated/ff-battle-bg.dim_1920x1080.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/ff-header-bg.dim_1200x400.png as static assets. Modify CSS custom properties and background patterns to reflect authentic Free Fire battlefield environments with combat zones. Ensure backgrounds are responsive and maintain visual quality across different screen sizes.

Update the Layout component to apply Free Fire battle-themed background styling. Ensure the main content wrapper uses the battlefield background image frontend/public/assets/generated/ff-battle-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as a static asset. Adjust opacity, positioning, and layering to maintain content readability while showcasing the authentic Free Fire combat environment.

Update the Home page hero section to use the Free Fire themed header background frontend/public/assets/generated/ff-header-bg.dim_1200x400.png as a static asset. Ensure the battle-themed background is prominently displayed in the hero banner area and integrates seamlessly with the page layout.

requirements.summary: Update the application's color scheme and theme styling to match authentic Free Fire battle aesthetics including signature colors and UI patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme reflects authentic Free Fire game colors and battle UI patterns
All gaming-themed components (buttons, cards, navigation) use Free Fire battle-inspired styling
Theme maintains cohesion with Free Fire's actual in-game interface aesthetics

file_operations.description: Update the Tailwind configuration to incorporate authentic Free Fire battle color palette. Adjust the existing FF-orange and FF-cyan colors to match the actual Free Fire game's signature colors more closely. Add new color variants inspired by Free Fire's in-game UI elements such as combat HUD colors, weapon rarity colors (common, rare, epic, legendary), and battle zone indicators. Ensure color harmony across primary, secondary, and accent colors to reflect authentic Free Fire battle aesthetics.

Update global CSS variables and utility classes to reflect authentic Free Fire battle aesthetics. Modify the color scheme to match Free Fire's actual in-game interface patterns including HUD colors, status indicators, and combat UI elements. Update card backgrounds, borders, and glow effects to use Free Fire's signature visual style. Add battle-inspired texture overlays and gradient patterns that match the game's combat interface.

Update the GamingButton component styling to match authentic Free Fire battle UI button styles. Modify gradient backgrounds, hover effects, and glow animations to reflect Free Fire's in-game button aesthetics including weapon selection buttons and action buttons from the actual game interface. Ensure variants (primary, secondary, danger) align with Free Fire's UI color patterns.

Update the GamingCard component to use authentic Free Fire battle-themed styling. Modify the card background, borders, and glow effects to match Free Fire's in-game card UI elements such as loadout cards, character cards, and weapon cards. Update backdrop blur and hover effects to reflect the game's interface aesthetics.

Update the Navigation component styling to match authentic Free Fire battle UI navigation patterns. Modify the navigation bar background, link styling, and mobile menu to reflect Free Fire's in-game menu aesthetics including HUD navigation and settings menu styles. Ensure active states and hover effects align with the game's interface patterns.

requirements.summary: Display the owner name 'NIRANJAN' prominently in the application interface with Free Fire battle theme styling
acceptanceCriteria: Owner name 'NIRANJAN' is displayed in a prominent location visible to users
Name styling is consistent with Free Fire battle theme aesthetics
Text is clearly readable against the battle-themed background

file_operations.description: Add the owner name 'NIRANJAN' to the Navigation component in a prominent position such as the left side of the navigation bar or as part of the branding area. Style the name with Free Fire battle-themed typography including bold weight, uppercase letters, and appropriate color (FF-orange or contrasting color) to ensure visibility against the battlefield background. Add a subtle glow or text shadow effect to enhance readability and match Free Fire's in-game player name display style.

Ensure the Layout component properly displays the owner name 'NIRANJAN' from the Navigation component. Verify that the name remains visible and readable across all pages when the battlefield background is applied. Adjust layout spacing and z-index if needed to maintain prominence of the owner name.
